overall.description: A nighttime walk along a sandy beach in a video game environment (GTA V style), passing colorful umbrellas, bonfires, and beachgoers, then ascending stairs to an upper pool deck with resort buildings and mountain views.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dark sandy beach at night, approaching a group of people gathered around a bonfire. Colorful beach umbrellas and towels are scattered on the sand, with beachfront buildings lining the right side and the ocean visible to the left.

segments.scene_description: Passing the volleyball net and approaching a concrete stairway leading up from the beach. A colorful beach ball lies on the sand near the stairs as the camera begins to ascend to the upper pool deck level.

segments.scene_description: Exploring the upper pool deck area featuring a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and resort buildings. The area is lit by artificial lighting with mountains visible in the dark background, creating a serene nighttime resort atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, lively beach at night up to a serene, elevated resort pool deck. It begins by walking along the sandy shore past scattered towels and colorful umbrellas, approaching a group of people gathered around a glowing bonfire. As the camera moves past the fire and continues across the open beach, the scene shifts toward a volleyball net and a stray beach ball resting near a concrete stairway. The camera then ascends these stairs, leaving the sand behind to enter an upper deck area featuring a swimming pool and lounge chairs. Finally, the view expands across the artificially lit resort buildings to reveal dark mountains looming in the background.
